name: foldin
purpose: Compresses AI conversation history into a tiny semantic state (~300 tokens) to reduce token usage across long conversations.

state_layers.stateVector: Rolling prose summary of the conversation, rewritten every 3 turns
state_layers.factWatchlist: Hard facts extracted each turn as key:value pairs
state_layers.turnCount: Total turns recorded, used to trigger state rewrites

createFold.description: Creates a Fold instance. Call once per app, not once per conversation.

params.storage: { get: async (id: string) => FoldState | null, set: async (id: string, state: FoldState) => void }
params.compress: async (prompt: string) => string — your AI caller, any provider, any model

pack.description: Call before every AI request. Returns messages array ready to pass directly to your AI API.
pack.returns: { messages: Array<{ role: string, content: string }> }

update.description: Call after every AI response. Fire-and-forget — do not await. Runs background compression asynchronously.

reset.description: Clears all compressed state for a conversation. Call when starting a fresh conversation on the same ID.

constraints: compress must be a plain async function, not an AI SDK instance
storage must implement both get and set
update() is fire-and-forget — never await it
compress is called once per turn for fact extraction, and a second time every 3 turns for state rewrite
anti_patterns: do not pass an SDK directly as compress — wrap it in a function
do not share storage keys across different conversation IDs
do not call reset() mid-conversation unless intentionally wiping state

performance.token_savings: ~78% reduction vs raw history on realistic conversations
performance.savings_start: turn 1 — compression is active from the first turn
performance.context_size: stays flat as conversation grows, raw history grows linearly
